items.label: Unit Tests Passed — Frontend
messages: Good, the NavBar.test.tsx already exists with comprehensive tests for the HealthBadge feature. Now let me run the tests.
All 19 tests pass across 3 suites. Now let me verify E2E tests compile.
All E2E tests compile and list successfully, including the `health.spec.ts` E2E test. Now let me mark the pipeline step complete.

All done. Here's a summary of the frontend unit test verification:  ## Results  **✅ All unit tests passed (19/19 across 3 suites)**  | Suite | Tests | Status | |-------|-------|--------| | `NavBar.test.tsx` | 5 | ✅ Pass | | `DemoLoginForm.test.tsx` | 5 | ✅ Pass | | `apiClient.test.ts` | 9 | ✅ Pass |  **Health Badge tests specifically verified:** 1. ✅ Renders "System Online" when `/api/health` returns 200 2. ✅ Renders "Offline" when `/api/health` returns non-OK status (500) 3. ✅ Renders "Offline" when fetch throws a network error 4. ✅ Calls fetch with the correct health endpoint URL 5. ✅ Shows "Checking…" in loading state initially  **✅ E2E tests compile** — 10 tests listed across 3 files, including `health.spec.ts` with 2 health badge E2E tests.  **No regressions** — all existing tests continue to pass.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete health-badge frontend-unit-test 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Unit Tests Passed — Frontend" 2>&1

items.label: Unit Tests Passed — Backend
messages: Good. I can see the implementation and tests are already in place. Let me now run the tests.
All 26 tests passed (3 suites passed, 1 skipped which is the integration test). Now let me run schema validation.

All tests passed: - **Unit tests**: 26 passed (3 suites), 1 integration suite correctly skipped - **Schema validation**: 38 passed (including HealthResponseSchema tests)  Now let me mark the pipeline complete and commit.

All tasks completed successfully:  **Summary:** - ✅ **Unit tests (Jest)**: 26/26 passed across 3 test suites (`fn-health`, `fn-hello`, `fn-demo-login`). The `fn-health` tests validate: 200 response, ISO-8601 timestamp, `HealthResponseSchema` conformance, logging, literal `"ok"` status, and timestamp recency. - ✅ **Schema validation**: 38/38 passed, including 8 `HealthResponseSchema` tests (valid parse, timestamp format, status literal enforcement, missing field rejection, extra field stripping). - ✅ Pipeline state marked complete and committed.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete health-badge backend-unit-test 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Unit Tests Passed — Backend" 2>&1
